basics.name: Srikrishna Sadula
basics.summary: Seasoned AI and technology leader with 18+ years of experience in AI-driven product engineering across finance, healthcare, insurance, and telecom. Expertise in Agentic AI, Generative AI, Computer Vision, RAG pipelines, and enterprise AI strategy.

highlights: Led a 30-member AI organization delivering enterprise solutions across Insurance, Finance, Pharma, and Clinical Research.
Architected agentic AI ecosystems (LangChain, LlamaIndex, CrewAI) and RAG pipelines using MCP; improved contextual accuracy by ~35%.
Delivered production-grade Computer Vision and OCR solutions (OpenCV, EasyOCR, PDFPlumber).
Spearheaded initiatives saving annual costs and driving multi-million USD revenue.
Led a 20-member team building the Cognitive Machine Reading (CMR) platform; processed 10M+ documents.
Integrated hybrid AI + OCR methods and improved recognition accuracy by 40%.
Built end-to-end AI pipelines for customer segmentation, churn prediction, and recommendation systems.
Deployed analytics dashboards with PySpark, Kafka, Databricks.
Developed host management software and anomaly detection systems for wireless backhaul chipsets (80M+ units).
Filed a patent for UPnP model design to improve interoperability.
Developed Wi-Fi and P2P communication software for Samsung Galaxy devices.
Filed three patents related to Wi‑Fi Display (Miracast) and cross-device streaming.
Worked on network protocol stacks and sensor-driven fault-tolerant systems.

skills: Agentic AI & LLM Ecosystems (LangChain, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, AutoGen, LangGraph)
Computer Vision & OCR (OpenCV, Tesseract, EasyOCR, PDFPlumber)
Cloud & MLOps (AWS, Azure, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow)

publications.title: Deep Learning Based Sustainable Material Attribution for Apparels
